name: Gingered Sweet-Potato Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon dried hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the sweet potato.
2. In a food processor, chop fine the grated sweet potato with the gingerroot, lemon juice, red pepper flakes, and salt.
3. Add the egg and flour to the mixture, then blend well.
4. Heat 1 1/2 inches of vegetable oil in a large saucepan over moderately high heat until it reaches 360°F on a deep-fat thermometer.
5. Drop tablespoons of the sweet-potato mixture into the hot oil in batches.
6. Fry the fritters, turning them occasionally for about 2 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
7. Transfer the fritters to paper towels to drain excess oil.
Makes about 18 small fritters, serving as an hors d'oeuvre.
